footer.aboutDescription: InKnowing is an AI-powered conversational platform where classic books and characters come to life, opening the door to a new way of learning.
footer.tagline: Powered by AI · Made with care

home.heroTitle: Talk to the Classics, Let Knowledge Flow
home.heroSubtitle: InKnowing is an AI-powered conversational learning platform. Converse with timeless books, question history's greatest minds, and discover an entirely new way to learn.

search.placeholder: Search by title, author, or topic…
search.noResultsTitle: No books or characters found for "{query}"
search.noResultsDescPart1: No worries — you can request this book directly.
search.noResultsDescPart2: If our AI knows it, we'll add it to the library right away; if not, it'll land in our wishlist for the team to review.
search.fallbackRequest: Can't find what you're looking for?

about.heroSubtitle: Let knowledge flow. Talk to the classics.
about.philosophyItem1Body: At InKnowing, we believe every classic book holds profound wisdom. Through AI, we bring that wisdom off the shelf and into conversation — answering your questions and sparking new ideas.
about.philosophyItem2Body: Go beyond the plot and talk directly with the characters. Wonder how Lu Zhishen would view today's world? Curious what Jane Eyre would say about your choices? With InKnowing, it's all possible.
about.philosophyItem3Body: Everyone learns differently. InKnowing's intelligent dialogue adapts to your questions and interests, offering a personalized path of discovery — making learning feel natural and enjoyable.
about.missionIntro: In an age of information overload, we are committed to:
about.missionItem1Body: Give timeless books new life through modern technology
about.missionItem2Body: Build a bridge of meaningful dialogue between readers and works
about.missionItem3Body: Awaken the curiosity and love of learning in everyone
about.techItem1Body: Built on advanced large language models for natural, fluent conversations about knowledge
about.techItem2Body: Precisely retrieves relevant passages from books to ensure answers are accurate and on-topic
about.techItem3Body: Faithfully recreates each character's personality and voice
about.techItem4Body: Saves your learning journey so you can pick up any conversation where you left off
about.ctaSubtitle: Talk deeply with classic books and characters, and discover the endless possibilities of knowledge
